metadata.website_type: river cruise and boat tours operator

tasks.name: Book the cheapest sunset river cruise for 2 adults on a Friday in June under $80 total
tasks.description: Find sunset or evening river cruises on Fridays in June, filter by price under $40 per person, prioritize options with drinks included, and book the cheapest suitable cruise for 2 adults until the booking summary page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled something like "Cruises" or "All Tours" to open the list of available cruises.
In the cruise type or theme filters, select the option labeled "Sunset", "Evening", or the closest equivalent to show only sunset/evening cruises.
Open the date picker and select any Friday in June of the upcoming season (for example, choose the first Friday visible in June).
Open the price filter and enter "40" as the maximum price per adult ticket, then apply the filter.
Open the "Inclusions" or "Extras" filter and select the option labeled "Drinks included", "Welcome drink", or the closest match if such an option exists.
Use the sort dropdown above the results and select the option "Price: Low to High".

From the sorted results, click on the first cruise card that is marked as a sunset or evening cruise and shows drinks included; if no cruises show drinks included, click on the first sunset/evening cruise result instead.

On the cruise detail page, use the date selector to confirm the chosen Friday in June, select a sunset or evening departure time if there are multiple times, set the number of adults to "2", and click the primary action button such as "Book Now" or "Continue" until you reach the booking summary page showing the total price.

tasks.name: Book two daytime sightseeing tours on the same day for 1 adult under $120 total with at least a 2-hour gap
tasks.description: Find daytime sightseeing boat tours on the same date, choose two different tours for 1 adult with start times at least 2 hours apart and a combined total under $120, and add both to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the main navigation to go to the "Sightseeing" or similar category that lists general sightseeing boat tours.
Open the date picker and select a Saturday within the next available month (for example, the second Saturday visible).
Use the time-of-day filter to select "Morning" and "Afternoon" or any options that together limit results to departures before 4:00 PM.
Apply a price filter so that only tours with an adult ticket price of $80 or less are shown, then apply the filter.

From the filtered list, click on the first tour whose adult price is $70 or less, note its listed start time, select the previously chosen Saturday date, set passengers to "1 Adult", and add this tour to the cart using the "Add to Cart" or "Book" button.
Return to the sightseeing tours list for the same Saturday by using the navigation breadcrumb or "Back to tours" link.

Scroll through the remaining tours and select a different tour whose adult price is less than or equal to $50 and whose listed start time is at least 2 hours later than the first tour’s start time; click on this tour’s card.
On the second tour’s detail page, ensure the same Saturday date is selected, set passengers to "1 Adult", and click the "Add to Cart" or equivalent button.
Use the cart icon or "View Cart" link in the header to open the cart page and proceed to the cart or booking overview page showing both tours for 1 adult with a combined price under $120.

tasks.name: Reserve the longest private evening charter for 10 people on a September weekend under $900
tasks.description: Search for private boat charters in September on a Saturday or Sunday evening, filter for group size 10, duration at least 3 hours, price under $900 total, and book the longest available option for 10 guests up to the details page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Private Charters", "Private Hire", or the closest equivalent to open the private charter options.
Use the date or month filter to select the month of September and limit the day-of-week options to weekends by choosing "Saturday" and "Sunday" or any filter that indicates weekends.
Find and open the group size or capacity filter, and set the group size to "10" guests or select a range that includes 10 people.
Use a duration filter or slider to set the minimum duration to "3 hours" and apply this duration constraint.
Set a price or budget filter so that the maximum total price is set to "900" and apply the filter.
Use the sort dropdown and choose the option that sorts by "Duration: Longest First" or similar.
From the sorted list, click on the first private charter option that departs in the evening (for example, any start time at or after 5:00 PM).

On the charter detail page, select a specific Saturday or Sunday date in September from the calendar, choose an evening time slot if multiple times are offered, ensure the number of guests is set to "10", leave any optional extras unselected (or select the cheapest available extra if required), and click the primary action button such as "Request Booking" or "Continue" to reach the charter booking details or summary page.

tasks.name: Purchase a $150 gift card usable for any cruise with a personalized message
tasks.description: Navigate to the gift card section, create a gift card for exactly $150 that can be used for any cruise, enter recipient and sender information plus a custom message, and add it to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the main navigation or footer links to open the page labeled "Gift Cards", "Vouchers", or the closest equivalent.
On the gift card page, select the option that allows a custom amount (rather than a fixed amount), and type "150" into the amount field.
In any "Card type" or "Applies to" dropdown, select the option that indicates the gift card is valid for "All cruises", "Any tour", or the broadest available option.
Fill in the recipient name field with a sample name such as "Alex Rivera" and, if an email field is present, enter "alex.rivera@example.com".
Fill in the sender name field with a sample name such as "Jordan Lee" and type a personalized message such as "Happy birthday! Enjoy a cruise of your choice." into the message text area.
If a delivery method selection is available, choose the default or "Email" delivery option without changing to any other method.
Click the "Add to Cart", "Buy Gift Card", or equivalent button to place the $150 gift card in the cart.
Use the cart icon or "View Cart" link to navigate to the cart or checkout preview page where the $150 any-cruise gift card is listed.

tasks.name: Book a family-friendly lunch cruise for 2 adults and 1 child before 2 PM under $200 total
tasks.description: Find a family-friendly river cruise that includes lunch, departs before 2:00 PM, and costs under $200 total for 2 adults and 1 child, then book it up to the booking summary page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Open the "Family" or "Family-Friendly" section from the main navigation or filter the list of cruises by selecting the "Family-friendly" tag.
In the filters, select the inclusion labeled "Lunch included", "Onboard meal", or the closest equivalent so that only cruises with lunch are displayed.
Open the date picker and choose a Sunday in the next calendar month (for example, the first Sunday that appears).
Use the time-of-day or departure time filter to select options that depart in the "Morning" or specifically before 2:00 PM.

Apply a price or budget filter so that the maximum estimated total amount is set to $220, then use any available "Price per adult" information on the listings to scroll and find a cruise where the displayed pricing would keep 2 adult tickets plus 1 child ticket under $200 (for example, an adult price of $60 or less and a child price of $40 or less).
Click on the first cruise card that fits the time and price expectations for a pre-2:00 PM departure and appears to keep the family total under $200.

On the cruise detail page, select the chosen Sunday date, choose a departure time that starts before 2:00 PM if multiple times are shown, set the passenger quantities to "2 Adults" and "1 Child", and use the "Book Now" or "Continue" button to go to the booking summary page showing the total price.

If the displayed total price on the summary page is above $200, use the site’s back navigation or breadcrumb to return to the family-friendly lunch cruise listings and repeat the selection process with the next cheapest suitable option; otherwise, stop on the summary page with the under-$200 booking configured.

tasks.name: Book the highest-rated dinner cruise with live music of at least 2.5 hours for 2 adults under $120 per adult and apply a promo code
tasks.description: Search for dinner cruises with live music lasting at least 2.5 hours, sort by rating, choose the best-rated option with an adult price under $120, book for 2 adults on the next Saturday, and apply the promo code 'SUMMER10' at checkout.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Dinner Cruises", "Evening & Dining", or similar category from the main navigation.
In the filters, select the feature labeled "Live music" or the closest equivalent to show only cruises with live entertainment.
Use the duration filter to set a minimum duration of "2.5 hours" (150 minutes) and apply the filter.
Use the sort dropdown to select "Rating: High to Low" or whichever option sorts by customer rating from best to worst.

From the sorted list, click on the first cruise where the listed price per adult is less than or equal to $120; if the first cruise shows a higher adult price, skip it and click on the next one that meets the price condition.

On the chosen cruise detail page, open the date picker, select the next available Saturday date, choose an evening departure time if multiple options are listed, and set the number of passengers to "2 Adults".
Click the primary action button such as "Book Now" or "Continue" to move to the checkout or payment details page.

On the checkout page, locate the promotional code or discount field, type "SUMMER10" into the promo code box, and click the button to apply or update the booking with the promo code while staying on the checkout page.

tasks.name: Find the earliest boat tour from Old Town Pier within 7 days for 3 adults priced between $30 and $60 per adult
tasks.description: Use search or location filters to find tours departing from 'Old Town Pier' within the next 7 days, with 60–90 minute duration and an adult ticket price between $30 and $60, then select the earliest available departure and add 3 adult tickets to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the site search bar to type "Old Town Pier" and press Enter or click the search icon to view tours related to that departure point.
If a dedicated "Departure point" or "Location" filter is available, select "Old Town Pier" from the list to restrict results to tours leaving from that location.
Open the date filter and set the date range to start from today and end 7 days from today (for example, select today as the start date and the date one week later as the end date).
Use the duration filter or slider to limit results to tours lasting between 60 and 90 minutes (for example, select a range of 1 to 1.5 hours).
Adjust the price per adult filter so the minimum is set to "30" and the maximum is set to "60", then apply the filter.
Use the sort dropdown and choose "Departure Time: Earliest First" or the closest option that sorts by soonest departure within the selected date range.

From the sorted list, click on the first tour result that matches the Old Town Pier departure, then on its detail page select the earliest date and time offered within the next 7 days, set the passenger count to "3 Adults", and click the "Add to Cart" or "Book" button.
Open the cart or booking overview page using the cart icon or the provided link to view the configured tour for 3 adults.

tasks.name: Compare sightseeing cruises and book one that includes both audio guide and free 24-hour cancellation for 1 adult under $75
tasks.description: Browse sightseeing cruises, filter by price under $75, compare at least two options to find one that includes both an audio guide and free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure, and book it for 1 adult.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Use the main navigation to go to the "Sightseeing" or general sightseeing cruises category.
Apply a price filter with a maximum adult ticket price of "75" and apply the filter to the sightseeing results.
If available, use feature filters to select "Audio guide" and "Free cancellation"; if the filters are separate, select both features so only tours that show these tags are prioritized.
Scroll through the first page of sightseeing results and open the first two tours that meet the under-$75 price condition in new tabs by clicking their titles or images.

Switch to the first tour’s tab and scroll to its "What’s included" or features section, confirming that it explicitly lists both an audio guide and free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure; if either feature is missing, plan to choose the second tour instead.

Switch to the second tour’s tab and similarly scroll to its inclusions section to see whether both an audio guide and free 24-hour cancellation are listed, comparing it with the first tour’s features.

Based on the inclusions sections, keep the tab for the tour that offers both an audio guide and free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure (or, if both do, choose the cheaper one by comparing their adult ticket prices) and close the other tour tab.

On the selected tour’s detail page, choose a date within the next month from the date picker, set the passenger count to "1 Adult", and click the "Book Now" or "Continue" button to proceed to the booking summary or checkout page with that configuration.

entities.name: Category
entities.description: Top-level cruise and tour categories used for navigation and filtering

fields.name: id
fields.description: Internal identifier, may match URL categoryId

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL slug, e.g. 'sightseeing'

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the category

fields.name: is_primary_nav
fields.description: Whether category appears in primary navigation

fields.name: nav_category_id
fields.description: Matches categoryId used in navigation URLs where applicable

entities.name: DepartureLocation
entities.description: Pier or location from which cruises and tours depart

fields.name: name
fields.description: E.g. 'Old Town Pier'

fields.name: code
fields.description: Short code for filtering/search, e.g. 'old_town_pier'

entities.name: CruiseTour
entities.description: Core product entity for cruises, sightseeing tours, dinner cruises, and private charters

fields.name: product_type
fields.description: Shared public cruise vs private charter

fields.name: categories
fields.description: Categories this product appears in, using nav category IDs

fields.name: category_ids_enum
fields.description: Helper enum definition for values stored in categories array

fields.name: departure_location_id
fields.description: Reference to DepartureLocation

fields.name: duration_minutes
fields.description: Standard duration used for filtering (e.g., 90, 150, 180)

fields.name: min_duration_minutes
fields.description: For charters with variable duration

fields.name: time_of_day_tags
fields.description: Tags for when the cruise typically departs (morning, afternoon, evening, sunset)

fields.name: time_of_day_enum
fields.description: Helper enum definition for values stored in time_of_day_tags

fields.name: features
fields.description: Feature tags such as lunch included, drinks included, audio guide, live music, free cancellation

fields.name: feature_enum
fields.description: Helper enum definition for values stored in features

fields.name: free_cancellation_cutoff_hours
fields.description: E.g., 24 for 'free cancellation up to 24 hours'

fields.name: pricing_model
fields.description: Per passenger vs flat charter price

fields.name: base_price_adult
fields.description: Standard adult ticket price used for filters and totals

fields.name: base_price_per_charter
fields.description: Flat charter price used for group filters

fields.name: min_group_size
fields.description: Minimum passengers/group size (e.g., for charters)

fields.name: max_group_size
fields.description: Maximum passengers or charter capacity

fields.name: average_rating
fields.description: Average customer rating used for sorting

fields.name: default_start_time
fields.description: Representative start time (HH:mm) used for listing display and departure-time sort

fields.name: available_days_of_week
fields.description: Days of week the cruise typically operates

fields.name: day_of_week_enum
fields.description: Helper enum definition for values stored in available_days_of_week

entities.name: TimeSlot
entities.description: Generic departure time options for a cruise or tour (chosen per date on the product page)

fields.name: label
fields.description: E.g., 'Morning departure', 'Sunset sailing'

fields.name: start_time
fields.description: Departure time in HH:mm, used for time filters

fields.name: time_of_day
fields.description: Used for Morning/Afternoon/Evening filters

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping cart / booking overview for the single active user

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of CartItem IDs or embedded items

fields.name: subtotal_amount
fields.description: Total before discounts

fields.name: applied_promo_code
fields.description: Promo code currently applied at checkout, e.g. 'SUMMER10'

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Individual line item in the cart (tour booking, charter booking, or gift card)

fields.name: item_type
fields.description: Identifies what this cart item represents

fields.name: cruise_tour_id
fields.description: For tour/charter bookings

fields.name: gift_card_item_id
fields.description: For gift card purchases

fields.name: date
fields.description: Selected departure date (date portion is relevant)

fields.name: departure_time
fields.description: Cached HH:mm for display and gap comparisons

fields.name: guest_count
fields.description: Total guests for private charters (e.g., 10)

fields.name: unit_price_adult
fields.description: Snapshot of per-adult price at booking time

fields.name: line_subtotal
fields.description: Total for this line before global discounts

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Optional extras or internal notes

entities.name: GiftCardTemplate
entities.description: Configurable gift card product options (fixed amounts and custom-amount settings)

fields.name: name
fields.description: E.g. 'Any Cruise Gift Card'

fields.name: fixed_amounts
fields.description: Predefined denominations (e.g., 50, 100, 200)

fields.name: default_applies_to_scope
fields.description: Default validity scope for gift cards created from this template

entities.name: GiftCardItem
entities.description: Concrete configured gift card (amount, recipient, scope) that can be added to cart and purchased

fields.name: amount
fields.description: E.g., 150 for a $150 gift card

fields.name: applies_to_scope
fields.description: Where the gift card can be used

fields.name: applicable_category_ids
fields.description: Categories this gift card is limited to when scope is specific_category

fields.name: category_ids_enum
fields.description: Helper enum definition for values stored in applicable_category_ids

fields.name: applicable_product_ids
fields.description: Specific cruises/tours when scope is specific_product

fields.name: message
fields.description: Personalized message

fields.name: delivery_method
fields.description: Selected delivery method (tasks use email/default)

fields.name: is_in_cart
fields.description: True if not yet checked out

entities.name: PromoCode
entities.description: Promotional codes applicable at checkout (e.g., SUMMER10)

fields.name: code
fields.description: E.g., 'SUMMER10'

fields.name: discount_type
fields.description: Calculation type for discount

fields.name: discount_value
fields.description: Percentage (e.g., 10) or amount (e.g., 15)

fields.name: applies_to_scope
fields.description: What items the promo code can discount

fields.name: applicable_category_ids
fields.description: Categories this promo applies to when scope is specific_category

fields.name: category_ids_enum
fields.description: Helper enum definition for values stored in applicable_category_ids

fields.name: applicable_product_ids
fields.description: Specific CruiseTour IDs when scope is specific_product

fields.name: min_cart_total
fields.description: Minimum subtotal to apply code

entities.name: BookingOrder
entities.description: Finalized booking or purchase created at checkout, used for confirmation page

fields.name: reference_code
fields.description: Human-friendly confirmation code

fields.name: status
fields.description: Overall booking status

fields.name: booking_item_ids
fields.description: IDs of BookingItem records included

fields.name: payment_status
fields.description: Payment completion status

entities.name: BookingItem
entities.description: Snapshot of a cart item stored as part of a finalized BookingOrder

fields.name: item_type
fields.description: Type of booked item

relationships.description: CruiseTour is listed under one or more navigation categories
Each CruiseTour departs from a specific location
Each TimeSlot is associated with a single CruiseTour
Each CartItem belongs to the single active Cart
Tour and charter bookings in the cart reference a CruiseTour
Gift card cart items reference a configured GiftCardItem
Each configured gift card is based on a GiftCardTemplate
PromoCode may apply only to certain categories
PromoCode may apply only to specific cruise/tour products
Gift cards can be restricted to specific categories
Gift cards can be restricted to specific products
Each BookingItem is part of a BookingOrder
Booked cruises and charters reference a CruiseTour
Booked gift cards reference a GiftCardItem definition
